upasargachandrika.example_text: 'varuRena samubjitAM mitraH prAtaryubjatu' (aTarva0 9318) varuRena nAmitAM (saMvftAM) mitro devaH prAtarvivfRotvityarTaH SAlAmiti viSezyam
'BujanyubjO pARyupatApayoH' (pA0 7361) nyubjitAH Serate'sminniti nyubja upatApo rogaH

'tena SatrUnaBi sarvAnnyubja' (aTarva0 886) aBinyubja vaSe kuru Avarjaya ranDaya (vede raDirvaSagamane vartate tasyedaM Rici lowi)
